use_cases: Displaying loading states during async operations in SaaS applications
Indicating data fetching or processing in dashboards
Providing visual feedback during form submissions
Showing processing status in e-commerce checkout flows
Indicating background operations in dev-tools interfaces
ai_summary: A loading ripple animation component featuring concentric pulsing circles with glass-morphism styling, backdrop blur, and gradient fills. Displays a radial ripple effect with staggered timing across five nested circular elements. Supports dark mode and provides visual feedback during async operations, data fetching, or processing states across various application types.
